info.name: Informatica IICS Platform REST API
Authentication
Log in to Informatica Intelligent Cloud Services

items.docs: Authenticates a user and returns a session ID and server URL for subsequent API calls. The session ID expires after 30 minutes of inactivity.

info.name: Informatica Log Out and End the Rest Api Session

items.docs: Ends the current REST API session. You can also end all active sessions for the organization.

info.name: Connections
Informatica Retrieve All Connections in the Organization

items.docs: Returns connection details for all connections configured in the organization. Results can be filtered by agent or runtime environment.

info.name: Informatica Create a New Connection

items.docs: Creates a new connection in the organization with the specified configuration including connection type, credentials, and runtime environment.

info.name: Informatica Retrieve a Connection by Id

params.name: connectionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the connection.

items.docs: Returns the details of a specific connection identified by its ID.

info.name: Informatica Update an Existing Connection

params.name: connectionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the connection.

items.docs: Updates the configuration of an existing connection identified by its ID.

info.name: Informatica Delete a Connection

params.name: connectionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the connection.

items.docs: Deletes the connection identified by its ID.

info.name: Informatica Retrieve a Connection by Name

params.name: connectionName
params.description: The name of the connection. Spaces must be encoded as %20.

items.docs: Returns the details of a specific connection identified by its name. Spaces in the name must be encoded as %20.

info.name: Informatica Search for Connections by Agent or Runtime Environment

params.name: agentId
params.description: The Secure Agent ID to filter connections.

params.name: runtimeEnvironmentId
params.description: The runtime environment ID to filter connections.

params.name: uiType
params.description: The connection type to filter by (e.g., Oracle, Salesforce, MySQL).

items.docs: Searches for connections filtered by Secure Agent ID or runtime environment ID, combined with connection type.

info.name: Informatica Test a Connection

params.name: connectionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the connection.

items.docs: Tests the connection identified by its ID to verify that the credentials and configuration are valid.

info.name: Mappings
Informatica Retrieve All Mappings in the Organization

items.docs: Returns the mapping object for every mapping in the organization. When retrieving all mappings, parameter details are not included.

info.name: Informatica Retrieve a Mapping by Id

params.name: mappingId
params.description: The unique identifier of the mapping.

items.docs: Returns the details of a specific mapping identified by its ID, including parameter details.

info.name: Informatica Retrieve a Mapping by Name

params.name: mappingName
params.description: The name of the mapping.

items.docs: Returns the details of a specific mapping identified by its name.

info.name: Informatica Search for Mappings by Name

params.name: name
params.description: The mapping name or name pattern to search for.

items.docs: Searches for mappings matching the specified name pattern.

info.name: Mapping Tasks
Informatica Retrieve All Mapping Tasks in the Organization

items.docs: Returns summary information for all mapping tasks configured in the organization.

info.name: Informatica Create a New Mapping Task

items.docs: Creates a new mapping task in the organization. The request body must include the mapping reference, source and target connection configurations, and runtime parameters.

info.name: Informatica Retrieve a Mapping Task by Id

params.name: taskId
params.description: The unique identifier of the mapping task.

items.docs: Returns the full details of a mapping task identified by its ID.

info.name: Informatica Update an Existing Mapping Task

params.name: taskId
params.description: The unique identifier of the mapping task.

items.docs: Updates the configuration of a mapping task identified by its ID.

info.name: Informatica Delete a Mapping Task

params.name: taskId
params.description: The unique identifier of the mapping task.

items.docs: Deletes the mapping task identified by its ID.

info.name: Informatica Retrieve a Mapping Task by Name

params.name: taskName
params.description: The name of the mapping task.

items.docs: Returns the full details of a mapping task identified by its name.

info.name: Jobs
Informatica Start a Job for a Task or Taskflow

items.docs: Starts a job for a task identified by task ID or task name. Supports mapping tasks, synchronization tasks, data replication tasks, taskflows, and PowerCenter tasks.

info.name: Informatica Stop a Running Job

items.docs: Stops a running job. You can perform an immediate stop or a clean stop that allows the job to finish processing the current row.

info.name: Informatica Retrieve Activity Log Entries for Jobs

params.name: runId
params.description: Filter by the job run ID.

params.name: taskId
params.description: Filter by the task ID.

params.name: taskType
params.description: Filter by task type (e.g., MTT for mapping task, WORKFLOW for taskflow).

params.name: startTimeUTC
params.description: Filter for jobs started after this UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

params.name: endTimeUTC
params.description: Filter for jobs completed before this UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

items.docs: Returns activity log entries for completed and running jobs in the organization. Results can be filtered by run ID, task ID, or other criteria.

info.name: Schedules
Informatica Retrieve All Schedules

items.docs: Returns a list of all schedules in the organization.

info.name: Informatica Create a New Schedule

items.docs: Creates a new schedule in the organization.

info.name: Informatica Retrieve a Schedule by Id

params.name: scheduleId
params.description: The unique identifier of the schedule.

items.docs: Returns the details of a schedule identified by its ID.

info.name: Informatica Update an Existing Schedule

params.name: scheduleId
params.description: The unique identifier of the schedule.

items.docs: Updates the configuration of a schedule identified by its ID.

info.name: Informatica Delete a Schedule

params.name: scheduleId
params.description: The unique identifier of the schedule.

items.docs: Deletes the schedule identified by its ID.
